{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231523591BA7FE5E09B5E4BF6F39"}"},"total":3851},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7269966500987454267","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错，从头到尾都没有女主角，只不过有一些暖昧期，而且都是女生凑过来的，再说了，不管什么年代，只要一个人足够优秀，不管男女，追求者都不会少的，主角性格也比较好，没有动手动脚，也没有口嗨，还保持了一定的距离，很有分寸感。主角很厉害，很全能，人物塑造得很成功，就是结尾略微潦草，而且行文中有些地方转圜有点突兀，但是总体来说很不错，如果能发挥想象写写星辰大海那块可能就更好了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1692671124,"group_id":"7096336207122009121","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢看各种类型的故事或小说，也可能随便写写～","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0RzkRextvQRPeDrVfTDojfwPuw2QfwEsFhzdykJ+eVf","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a9112c63fb7c42cb85186c965e2d1ba5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796671&x-signature=8QKUZbSl8Pymr8EsZABk4bSMAfY%3D","user_id":"1235476579091630","user_name":"绮梦星河"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1235476579091630","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7096336207122009121","book_info":{"abstract":"【经典爽文】【燃到爆炸】【全能】

1380121","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总体很精彩，真正的爽文，时间情节上也很紧凑，就是时间段较短，另外身份提升的太快了，估计也是这一点原因造成了后期搂不住了，才匆匆结尾的吧！不过瑕不掩瑜，依旧是非常好看的一本都市系统文，而且无CP，强烈推荐！","text_exts":[{"e":89,"s":85,"text":"都市系统","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%83%BD%E5%B8%82%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774250639E4BF6F39%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227341256153681380121%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227096336207122009121%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%83%BD%E5%B8%82%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1709272832,"group_id":"7096336207122009121","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"随心写书，畅意人生，不做码字奴！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0KAP4/4a+SMZdCCUbX+53PwnwpnTO+iWgodBy4ChwAs","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3556242232187303","user_name":"Cz旅人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3556242232187303","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7096336207122009121","book_info":{"abstract":"【经典爽文】【燃到爆炸】【全能】
